overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game showing a character riding a horse through a mountainous forest trail. The rider navigates rocky terrain, passes another rider, crosses a wooden bridge over a river, and continues along a scenic riverside path on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with large boulders

agents.ego_description: riding horse at a steady pace through rocky forest terrain with large gray boulders and dense pine trees

entered.detail: massive gray rock boulders lining the trail
dense evergreen forest surrounding the path
narrow winding dirt path through the forest
dense tree cover creating dappled shadows

segments.scene_description: Riding through a dense forest with large gray rock formations and tall pine trees lining a narrow dirt trail. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy overhead as the horse navigates the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail opening toward river valley

events.description: passing an NPC rider traveling in the opposite direction on the narrow trail
river valley becomes visible in the distance ahead between the trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail and passing another horse rider, approaching a scenic river valley with rocky cliffs

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction, briefly passing by the ego on the left

entered.detail: wide river valley with water visible in the distance between the trees
steep rocky cliff face along the river edge

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the rider passes another horseman traveling the opposite way. The river valley comes into view ahead, with rocky cliffs visible on the left side as the path continues downward toward the water.

events.description: horse steps onto wooden bridge structure over the river
exiting the wooden bridge back onto dirt trail on the far side

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the wooden plank bridge over the flowing river below, then continuing onto the far bank

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with railings spanning the river
flowing river water visible below the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The horse crosses a weathered wooden bridge spanning the river, with water flowing beneath and rocky cliffs on the left. The ground transitions from dirt trail to wooden planks and back to dirt as the rider reaches the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic riverside trail with valley views

agents.ego_description: riding along the winding trail following the river valley with expansive views of the surrounding mountains and forest

entered.detail: mountain range visible in the far distance across the valley

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the riverside trail with the river now visible to the left in the valley below. The path winds through open terrain with distant mountains visible ahead, surrounded by scattered pine trees on the slopes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, forested trail that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit river valley. It begins deep within a dense forest of tall pine trees and gray rock formations, where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy as the horse navigates a narrow dirt path. As the trail expands, the rider passes another horseman, and the view shifts to reveal a descending path flanked by rocky cliffs leading toward a river. The scene then transitions as the horse crosses a weathered wooden bridge over flowing water before returning to the dirt trail on the far side. Finally, the path winds through open terrain with the river visible in the valley below, moving toward distant mountains under a clear sky.
